channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download CPU-Z 2.19
item.description: A wonderful development has been updated, in a simple way, can display technical information about the computer, your personal nature it will operate in Windows operating systems from version 98 to latest version 7. After starting, you can see the specifications of different sets of processing center, you can find out full data on the video card and motherboard, I forgot to add about RAM, download CPU-Z from our project in full news. CPU-Z - Check CPU hardware After installing, launch...

item.title: Download Disable Windows Defender 3.5
item.description: Usually, we need to disable Windows Defender to prevent it from deleting known files due to false positives. Sometimes, it can slow down your computer or interrupt your work. In such cases, you can easily disable it and enable it again later with just one click. We can also disable this feature (Real-time Monitoring) using the Defender Settings panel, but it will be automatically enabled after a period of time. This tool ensures that this feature is 100% disabled. It also disables all...

It's perfect for capturing images that you want to put into the help system, online tutorials, manuals, training guides, presentations, marketing materials, website, email, and more. Use HyperSnap to quickly share a picture perfect...

item.title: Download Perfectly Clear WorkBench 5.0.4.3144

One of the key features in Workbench is the ability to "export to API" when saving a Preset. This allows you to make image edits in Workbench and adjust the settings to suit your editing style and needs. You can...

item.title: Download Solid Explorer File Manager 3.4.2 build 304022

Solid Explorer is a popular file management app for Android devices that allows users to manage and organize their files and folders in an intuitive and user-friendly interface. It offers many features that make it stand out from other file management apps. Solid Explorer allows you to navigate to files stored on your device and automatically organize them into collections. item.title: Download CCleaner – Phone Cleaner 26.04.0 build 800011397
item.description: CCleaner is a system cleaning and optimization tool for Android devices. CCleaner for Android allows users to delete unnecessary files, such as temporary files and caches, as well as identify and uninstall applications that are taking up too much space on the device. It also includes a task kill to close running applications and free up memory. This can help free up storage space and improve device performance. In addition, CCleaner for Android also has a security feature that allows you...

item.description: Introducing the best silent camera! Without the shutter sound, photos can be taken in complete silence! It also ranks number 1 among many silent cameras thanks to its high image quality! Take high-quality photos with the silent camera! You won't disturb anyone around you because the shutter sound can't be heard. You can take high-quality photos of any situation, such as your baby's cute sleeping face, your pet's natural behaviors, and words written on a blackboard! Silent Camera...

item.title: Download Microsoft OneDrive 26.032.0217.0003
item.description: Microsoft OneDrive is a client application file transmission to the service cloud storage of Microsoft. If you are familiar with Dropbox, you will find that OneDrive works in a similar way. It creates a OneDrive folder and any files you copy into the folder will automatically be synced and uploaded to the cloud service OneDrive. item.title: Download QOwnNotes 26.3.10
item.description: QOwnNotes is notes bookmark file simple text (GPL) open source application for GNU / Linux , Mac OS X and Windows of Patrizio Bekerle ( pbek on GitHub and IRC) (optional) activity along with the notes application of ownCloud or Nextcloud. QOwnNote store your notes as plain text files and can be synchronized with synchronization function file of ownCloud / Nextcloud. You can also use other apps like Syncthing or Dropbox . Just write out your thoughts as they appear, and edit them if...

item.title: Download AI Offline Music Generator Pro 2.0.5
item.description: AI Offline Music Generator is a powerful, fully localized desktop application that converts your text descriptions into high-quality music tracks. Powered by advanced open-source AI models (MusicGen), this tool provides you with a private, offline recording studio right on your computer. Whether you need a "relaxing lo-fi rhythm for studying," a "grand cinematic orchestral intro," or an "energetic synthwave pop track," just input what you want to hear, and the AI ​​will create it...

item.title: Download Smart Launcher 6 ‧ Home Screen 6.6 build 007
item.description: Smart Launcher is a mobile app that provides users with a customized home screen and app launcher on their Android devices. It includes features like minimalist interface, automatic app sorting, and gesture controls. The app also includes many customizable settings, such as the ability to change the theme, icon size, and screen layout, as well as the ability to create custom categories for the app. Smart Launcher Features Ambient theme: Smart launcher automatically changes theme...
